revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{各世紀の統治者}} {{Wikten|ruler|統治者|支配者}} {{wikt|ruler|支配}} [[20世紀]]の[[統治者]]のカテゴリ。 {{see also|en:Category:…」
[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2023 October 13#Category:Rulers by century]] closed as keep ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.13|XFDcloser]])
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:20世紀の統治者]] [[ar:Category:حكام في القرن 20]] [[bn:Category:২০শ শতাব্দীর শাসক]] [[ce:Category:XX бӀешеран урхалчаш]] [[cv:Category:XX ĕмĕрти тытăмçăсем]] [[de:Category:Herrscher (20. Jahrhundert)]] [[es:Category:Gobernantes del siglo XX]] [[fa:Category:حکم‌رانان سده ۲۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Dirigeant politique du XXe siècle]] [[ko:Category:20세기 통치자]] [[mk:Category:Владетели од 20 век]] [[mn:Category:20-р зууны ноёрхогч]] [[ru:Category:Правители XX века]] [[simple:Category:20th-century rulers]] [[sv:Category:Regenter under 1900-talet]] [[tg:Category:Сарварони асри XX]] [[tr:Category:20. yüzyıl liderleri]] [[uk:Category:Правителі XX століття]] [[ur:Category:بیسویں صدی کے حکمران]] [[zh:Category:20世纪统治者]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:20世紀アジアの統治者]].

Jahrhundert)]] [[es:Category:Gobernantes del siglo XX]] [[fa:Category:حکم‌رانان سده ۲۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Dirigeant politique du XXe siècle]] [[ko:Category:20세기 통치자]] [[mk:Category:Владетели од 20 век]] [[mn:Category:20-р зууны ноёрхогч]] [[ru:Category:Правители XX века]] [[simple:Category:20th-century rulers]] [[sv:Category:Regenter under 1900-talet]] [[tg:Category:Сарварони асри XX]] [[tr:Category:20. yüzyıl liderleri]] [[uk:Category:Правителі XX століття]] [[ur:Category:بیسویں صدی کے حکمران]] [[zh:Category:20世纪统治者]] This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:20世紀アジアの統治者]]. {{translated page|ja|Category:20世紀の統治者|version=82735363|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2023 October 13#Category:Rulers by century]] closed as keep ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.13|XFDcloser]])

Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 2 enwiki]]" to "[[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[simple:" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==English Content== {{Portal|History|Biography|Politics}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[ar:Category:تصنيف:حكام في القرن 20]] [[arwiki:Category:تصنيف:حكام في القرن 20]] [[bn:Category:বিষয়শ্রেণী:২০শ শতাব্দীর শাসক]] [[ce:Category:Категори:XX бӀешеран урхалчаш]] [[cv:Category:Категори:XX ĕмĕрти тытăмçăсем]] [[de:Category:Kategorie:Herrscher (20. Jahrhundert)]] [[en:Category:20th-century rulers]] [[en:Category:20th-century rulers]] [[es:Category:Categoría:Gobernantes del siglo XX]] [[fa:Category:رده:حکم‌رانان سده ۲۰ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Catégorie:Dirigeant politique du XXe siècle]] [[ja:Category:20世紀の統治者]] [[ko:Category:분류:20세기 통치자]] [[mk:Category:Категорија:Владетели од 20 век]] [[mn:Category:Ангилал:20-р зууны ноёрхогч]] [[ru:Category:Категория:Правители XX века]] [[simple:Category:Category:20th-century rulers]] [[sv:Category:Kategori:Regenter under 1900-talet]] [[tg:Category:Гурӯҳ:Сарварони асри XX]] [[tr:Category:Kategori:20. yüzyıl liderleri]] [[trwikiso:Category:Kategori:20. yüzyıl liderleri]] [[uk:Category:Категорія:Правителі XX століття]] [[ur:Category:زمرہ:بیسویں صدی کے حکمران]] [[zh:Category:Category:20世纪统治者]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7985851)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
